{{infobox football tournament season
|title           = Copa do Brasil
|year            = 1999
|other_titles    = Copa do Brasil 1999
|image           =
|image_size       = 250px
|caption         = 
|country         = Brazil
|dates           = January 28 - June 27
|num_teams       = 65
|winners       = [[Esporte Clube Juventude|Juventude (RS)]]
|second       = [[Botafogo de Futebol e Regatas|Botafogo (RJ)]]
|matches         = 117
|goals           = 366
|scoring_leader = [[Romário]] (7)
|award          = 
|prev_season      = [[1998 Copa do Brasil|1998]]
|next_season      = [[2000 Copa do Brasil|2000]]
}}

The '''Copa do Brasil 1999''' was the 11th staging of the [[Copa do Brasil]].

The competition started on January 28, 1999, and concluded on June 27, 1999, with the second leg of the final, held at the [[Estádio do Maracanã]] in [[Rio de Janeiro]], in which [[Esporte Clube Juventude|Juventude]] lifted the trophy for the first time with a 0-0 draw with [[Botafogo de Futebol e Regatas|Botafogo]].

[[Romário]], of [[Clube de Regatas do Flamengo|Flamengo]], and [[Dejan Petković]], of [[Esporte Clube Vitória|Vitória]], with 7 goals each, were the competition's topscorers.

==Format==
The competition was disputed by 65 clubs in a [[Single-elimination tournament|knock-out]] format where all rounds were played over two legs and the [[away goals rule]] was used, with the exception of the preliminary match, which was played in a single match, and in the first two rounds if the away team won the first leg with an advantage of at least two goals, the second leg was not played and the club automatically qualified to the next round.

==Competition stages==
{{2TeamBracket
| RD1=Preliminary match
| RD1-team1='''[[Santa Cruz Futebol Clube|Santa Cruz (PE)]]'''
| RD1-score1=1
| RD1-team2=[[Clube Náutico Capibaribe|Náutico (PE)]]
| RD1-score2=0
}}

{{64TeamBracket

| RD1-team01=[[Centro Sportivo Alagoano|CSA (AL)]]
| RD1-score01=0
| RD1-team02='''[[São Paulo Futebol Clube|São Paulo (SP)]]'''
| RD1-score02=4

| RD1-team03='''[[Ypiranga Clube|Ypiranga (AP)]]'''
| RD1-score03=3 1
| RD1-team04=[[Sociedade Esportiva Picos|Picos (PI)]]
| RD1-score04=0 0

| RD1-team05=[[Esporte Clube Comercial (MS)|Comercial (MS)]]
| RD1-score05=0 1
| RD1-team06='''[[Criciúma Esporte Clube|Criciúma (SC)]]'''
| RD1-score06=1 3

| RD1-team07=[[Paysandu Sport Club|Paysandu (PA)]]
| RD1-score07=2 2
| RD1-team08='''[[Botafogo de Futebol e Regatas|Botafogo (RJ)]]'''
| RD1-score08=3 2

| RD1-team09=[[Rio Branco Atlético Clube|Rio Branco (ES)]]
| RD1-score09=1 0
| RD1-team10='''[[Associação Portuguesa de Desportos|Portuguesa (SP)]]'''
| RD1-score10=1 4

| RD1-team11='''[[Independência Futebol Clube|Independência (AC)]]'''
| RD1-score11=3 1
| RD1-team12=[[Atlético Roraima Clube|Roraima (RR)]]
| RD1-score12=1 1

| RD1-team13=[[Sampaio Corrêa Futebol Clube|Sampaio Corrêa (MA)]]
| RD1-score13=1
| RD1-team14='''[[Clube Atlético Paranaense|Atlético (PR)]]'''
| RD1-score14=3

| RD1-team15=[[Sociedade Esportiva e Recreativa Caxias do Sul|Caxias (RS)]]
| RD1-score15=3 0
| RD1-team16='''[[Cruzeiro Esporte Clube|Cruzeiro (MG)]]'''
| RD1-score16=2 5

| RD1-team17='''[[Vila Nova Futebol Clube|Vila Nova (GO)]]'''
| RD1-score17=2 0
| RD1-team18=[[Ceará Sporting Club|Ceará (CE)]]
| RD1-score18=1 0

| RD1-team19=[[ABC Futebol Clube|ABC (RN)]]
| RD1-score19=1 3
| RD1-team20='''[[Grêmio Foot-Ball Porto Alegrense|Grêmio (RS)]]'''
| RD1-score20=2 3

| RD1-team21=[[Club Sportivo Sergipe|Sergipe (SE)]]
| RD1-score21=2 2
| RD1-team22='''[[Associação Atlética Ponte Preta|Ponte Preta (SP)]]'''
| RD1-score22=0 5

| RD1-team23=[[Botafogo Futebol Clube (PB)|Botafogo (PB)]]
| RD1-score23=3 1
| RD1-team24='''[[Clube de Regatas do Flamengo|Flamengo (RJ)]]'''
| RD1-score24=3 2

| RD1-team25=[[São Raimundo Esporte Clube (AM)|São Raimundo (AM)]]
| RD1-score25=1 1
| RD1-team26='''[[Sociedade Esportiva Palmeiras|Palmeiras (SP)]]'''
| RD1-score26=2 3

| RD1-team27=[[Interporto Futebol Clube|Interporto (TO)]]
| RD1-score27=1
| RD1-team28='''[[Sociedade Esportiva do Gama|Gama (DF)]]'''
| RD1-score28=3

| RD1-team29=[[Esporte Clube Flamengo|Flamengo (PI)]]
| RD1-score29=0 2
| RD1-team30='''[[Esporte Clube Vitória|Vitória (BA)]]'''
| RD1-score30=1 5

| RD1-team31=[[Clube Atlético do Porto|Porto (PE)]]
| RD1-score31=0 0
| RD1-team32='''[[América Futebol Clube (MG)|América (MG)]]'''
| RD1-score32=1 2

| RD1-team33=[[Ubiratan Esporte Clube|Ubiratan (MS)]]
| RD1-score33=0 2
| RD1-team34='''[[Sport Club Corinthians Paulista|Corinthians (SP)]]'''
| RD1-score34=1 6

| RD1-team35='''[[Treze Futebol Clube|Treze (PB)]]'''
| RD1-score35=2 4
| RD1-team36=[[Santa Cruz Futebol Clube|Santa Cruz (PE)]]
| RD1-score36=3 2

| RD1-team37=[[Clube de Regatas Guará|Guará (DF)]]
| RD1-score37=1
| RD1-team38='''[[Esporte Clube Juventude|Juventude (RS)]]'''
| RD1-score38=5

| RD1-team39=[[Atlético Clube Lagartense|Lagartense (SE)]]
| RD1-score39=0 1
| RD1-team40='''[[Fluminense Football Club|Fluminense (RJ)]]'''
| RD1-score40=1 2

| RD1-team41=[[Fortaleza Esporte Clube|Fortaleza (CE)]]
| RD1-score41=1
| RD1-team42='''[[Coritiba Foot Ball Club|Coritiba (PR)]]'''
| RD1-score42=3

| RD1-team43=[[Figueirense Futebol Clube|Figueirense (SC)]]
| RD1-score43=1 0
| RD1-team44='''[[Avaí Futebol Clube|Avaí (SC)]]'''
| RD1-score44=2 0

| RD1-team45=[[Botafogo Futebol Clube (SP)|Botafogo (SP)]]
| RD1-score45=1 0
| RD1-team46='''[[Esporte Clube Bahia|Bahia (BA)]]'''
| RD1-score46=0 5

| RD1-team47=[[Linhares Esporte Clube|Linhares (ES)]]
| RD1-score47=0
| RD1-team48='''[[Clube Atlético Mineiro|Atlético (MG)]]'''
| RD1-score48=3

| RD1-team49=[[Clube do Remo|Remo (PA)]]
| RD1-score49=1 1
| RD1-team50='''[[Guarani Futebol Clube|Guarani (SP)]]'''
| RD1-score50=1 3

| RD1-team51=[[Nacional Futebol Clube|Nacional (AM)]]
| RD1-score51=0
| RD1-team52='''[[Sport Club do Recife|Sport (PE)]]'''
| RD1-score52=2

| RD1-team53='''[[Camaçari Futebol Clube|Camaçari (BA)]]'''
| RD1-score53=2 1
| RD1-team54=[[Paraná Clube|Paraná (PR)]]
| RD1-score54=0 2

| RD1-team55=[[Villa Nova Atlético Clube|Villa Nova (MG)]]
| RD1-score55=1 1
| RD1-team56='''[[Sport Club Internacional|Internacional (RS)]]'''
| RD1-score56=1 4

| RD1-team57=[[Sinop Futebol Clube|Sinop (MT)]]
| RD1-score57=0 0
| RD1-team58='''[[Santos Futebol Clube|Santos (SP)]]'''
| RD1-score58=1 6

| RD1-team59=[[Moto Club de São Luís|Moto Club (MA)]]
| RD1-score59=3 0
| RD1-team60='''[[Goiás Esporte Clube|Goiás (GO)]]'''
| RD1-score60=2 4

| RD1-team61=[[Clube de Regatas Brasil|CRB (AL)]]
| RD1-score61=1 1
| RD1-team62='''[[América Futebol Clube (RN)|América (RN)]]'''
| RD1-score62=1 2

| RD1-team63=[[Ji-Paraná Futebol Clube|Ji-Paraná (RO)]]
| RD1-score63=2
| RD1-team64='''[[Club de Regatas Vasco da Gama|Vasco (RJ)]]'''
| RD1-score64=4

| RD2-team01='''São Paulo (SP)'''
| RD2-score01=4
| RD2-team02=Ypiranga (AP)
| RD2-score02=1

| RD2-team03=Criciúma (SC)
| RD2-score03=2 0
| RD2-team04='''Botafogo (RJ)'''
| RD2-score04=1 2

| RD2-team05='''Portuguesa (SP)'''
| RD2-score05=3
| RD2-team06=Independência (AC)
| RD2-score06=1

| RD2-team07='''Atlético (PR)'''
| RD2-score07=0 3
| RD2-team08=Cruzeiro (MG)
| RD2-score08=0 3

| RD2-team09=Vila Nova (GO)
| RD2-score09=2 2
| RD2-team10='''Grêmio (RS)'''
| RD2-score10=1 4

| RD2-team11=Ponte Preta (SP)
| RD2-score11=0 0
| RD2-team12='''Flamengo (RJ)'''
| RD2-score12=1 3

| RD2-team13='''Palmeiras (SP)'''
| RD2-score13=1 5
| RD2-team14=Gama (DF)
| RD2-score14=0 0

| RD2-team15='''Vitória (BA)'''
| RD2-score15=1 3
| RD2-team16=América (MG)
| RD2-score16=0 0

| RD2-team17='''Corinthians (SP)'''
| RD2-score17=2 2 (pen: 4)
| RD2-team18=Treze (PB)
| RD2-score18=2 2 (pen: 2)

| RD2-team19='''Juventude (RS)'''
| RD2-score19=1 6
| RD2-team20=Fluminense (RJ)
| RD2-score20=3 0

| RD2-team21='''Coritiba (PR)'''
| RD2-score21=2 0
| RD2-team22=Avaí (SC)
| RD2-score22=2 0

| RD2-team23='''Bahia (BA)'''
| RD2-score23=1 1
| RD2-team24=Atlético (MG)
| RD2-score24=1 0

| RD2-team25='''Guarani (SP)'''
| RD2-score25=0 1
| RD2-team26=Sport (PE)
| RD2-score26=0 1

| RD2-team27=Camaçari (BA)
| RD2-score27=0 0
| RD2-team28='''Internacional (RS)'''
| RD2-score28=0 1

| RD2-team29=Santos (SP)
| RD2-score29=2 3
| RD2-team30='''Goiás (GO)'''
| RD2-score30=1 4

| RD2-team31=América (RN)
| RD2-score31=0 0
| RD2-team32='''Vasco (RJ)'''
| RD2-score32=1 2

| RD3-team01=São Paulo (SP)
| RD3-score01=1 1
| RD3-team02='''Botafogo (RJ)'''
| RD3-score02=1 3

| RD3-team03=Portuguesa (SP)
| RD3-score03=2 2
| RD3-team04='''Atlético (PR)'''
| RD3-score04=5 2

| RD3-team05=Grêmio (RS)
| RD3-score05=1 2
| RD3-team06='''Flamengo (RJ)'''
| RD3-score06=2 2

| RD3-team07='''Palmeiras (SP)'''
| RD3-score07=2 3
| RD3-team08=Vitória (BA)
| RD3-score08=2 2

| RD3-team09=Corinthians (SP)
| RD3-score09=0 0
| RD3-team10='''Juventude (RS)'''
| RD3-score10=2 1

| RD3-team11=Coritiba (PR)
| RD3-score11=0 1
| RD3-team12='''Bahia (BA)'''
| RD3-score12=3 1

| RD3-team13=Guarani (SP)
| RD3-score13=0 1
| RD3-team14='''Internacional (RS)'''
| RD3-score14=3 1

| RD3-team15='''Goiás (GO)'''
| RD3-score15=4 1
| RD3-team16=Vasco (RJ)
| RD3-score16=2 2

| RD4-team01='''Botafogo (RJ)'''
| RD4-score01=2 1 (pen: 4)
| RD4-team02=Atlético (PR)
| RD4-score02=1 2 (pen: 1)

| RD4-team03=Flamengo (RJ)
| RD4-score03=2 2
| RD4-team04='''Palmeiras (SP)'''
| RD4-score04=1 4

| RD4-team05='''Juventude (RS)'''
| RD4-score05=2 2 (pen: 4)
| RD4-team06=Bahia (BA)
| RD4-score06=2 2 (pen: 1)

| RD4-team07='''Internacional (RS)'''
| RD4-score07=1 1
| RD4-team08=Goiás (GO)
| RD4-score08=0 2

| RD5-team01='''Botafogo (RJ)'''
| RD5-score01=1 1 (pen: 4)
| RD5-team02=Palmeiras (SP)
| RD5-score02=1 1 (pen: 2)

| RD5-team03='''Juventude (RS)'''
| RD5-score03=0 4
| RD5-team04=Internacional (RS)
| RD5-score04=0 0

| RD6-team01=Botafogo (RJ)
| RD6-score01=1 0
| RD6-team02='''Juventude (RS)'''
| RD6-score02=2 0
}}

{| class="wikitable" style="text-align: center; margin: 0 auto;"
|-
!Copa do Brasil<br />1999 Winners
|-
|[[Image:Bandeira do Rio Grande do Sul.svg|100px|Rio Grande do Sul]]<br>'''[[Esporte Clube Juventude|Juventude]]'''<br/>'''First Title'''
|}

==References==
* [https://web.archive.org/web/20070829133455/http://paginas.terra.com.br/esporte/rsssfbrasil/tables/cbr1999.htm Copa do Brasil 1999 at RSSSF]
*''Enciclopédia do Futebol Brasileiro'', Volume 2 - Lance, Rio de Janeiro: Aretê Editorial S/A, 2001.

{{Copa do Brasil Seasons}}

{{DEFAULTSORT:Copa Do Brasil 1999}}
[[Category:1999 in domestic association football cups]]
[[Category:Copa do Brasil seasons|1999]]
[[Category:1999 in Brazilian football]]
